message:
fix(node): saturating arithmetic, safe casts, and ShimRegistry index rebuild

- dpor_schedule_gate: 4x `+=` → `saturating_add` in run_full_gate/run_full_gate_with_checker
- compat_gates: rebuild ShimRegistry.index after push_bounded eviction (index corruption bug)
- lineage_tracker: 5x `+=` → `saturating_add` in scan_graph, `as u64` → `u64::try_from`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
